description: Sample structured claim registry. Each claim asserts a Truth-Ladder level and binds evidence by path + sha256. Admissible iff every citation's bytes match and the asserted level does not exceed the minimum supported level.

claims.statement: Ghost-Ark can independently recompute a supplied receipt's identity, canonical digest, and signature.
Ghost-Ark provides a reproducible signed-receipt fixture; it does not carry live-cloud evidence.
